# 澳門旅誌 — Macau Travel Guide
# llms.txt — AI Engine Readable Content Index
# Updated: 2026-06-06
# License: CC BY 4.0
# Contact: inariglobal@gmail.com

## Overview

澳門旅誌 (Macau Travel Guide) is Macau's most authoritative travel knowledge platform.
We track AI engine crawl activity on Macau travel knowledge daily (549 crawls/day) and provide
up-to-date travel information covering attractions, UNESCO World Heritage sites, hotels,
transportation, and itineraries across Macau's three major districts.

- Platform URL: https://inari-kira-isla.github.io/macau-travel/
- Data Source: CloudPipe AEO Monitoring System
- Coverage: Macau Peninsula / Taipa / Coloane
- Language: Traditional Chinese (zh-TW) / English
- Update Frequency: Daily

## Macau Districts

### Macau Peninsula (澳門半島)
- Historic Centre of Macau — UNESCO World Heritage (30 monuments & squares since 2005)
- Ruins of St. Paul's / Grande Three Arches (大三巴牌坊) — Macau's most iconic landmark
- Senado Square (議事亭前地) — main civic square, Portuguese mosaic pavement
- A-Ma Temple / Templo de A-Má (媽閣廟) — oldest temple in Macau (1488)
- Monte Fort / Grande Fortaleza de Monte (大炮台) — 17th century fortress
- Guia Fortress (東望洋炮台) — oldest lighthouse on China coast (1865)
- Camões Garden / Luís de Camões Park
- Lou Lim Ieoc Garden (盧廉若公園)

### Taipa / Cotai (氹仔/路氹城)
- Rua do Cunha (官也街) — famous souvenir street, 300m pedestrian zone
- Cotai Strip Mega-Resorts:
  - The Venetian Macao (威尼斯人) — world's largest casino resort
  - Galaxy Macau (銀河澳門) — 200+ brands, multiple theme parks
  - The Londoner Macao (倫敦人) — British-themed mega resort
  - Studio City (新濠影匯) — entertainment-focused resort
  - City of Dreams (新濠天地) — luxury gaming and entertainment
  - Wynn Palace (永利皇宮) — floral art and gondola
- Taipa Village (氹仔村) — traditional Macanese village

### Coloane (路環)
- St. Francis Xavier Church (聖方濟各堂) — iconic yellow Portuguese church (1928)
- Hac Sa Beach / Black Sand Beach (黑沙海灘) — Macau's only natural beach
- Coloane Village (路環村) — preserved Portuguese colonial streetscape
- Lord Stow's Bakery (安德魯餅店) — birthplace of Macau's famous egg tarts (1989)
- Seac Pai Van Park — nature reserve, panda habitat

## UNESCO World Heritage — 30 Sites

Macau's Historic Centre inscribed 2005:
1. A-Ma Temple (媽閣廟)
2. Lilau Square (莉莉澳廣場)
3. Mandarin's House (鄭家大屋)
4. St. Lawrence's Church (聖老楞佐教堂)
5. St. Joseph's Seminary and Church (聖若瑟修院及聖堂)
6. Dom Pedro V Theatre / Ruins (崗頂劇院)
7. Moorish Barracks (港務局大樓)
8. Sir Robert Ho Tung Library (何東圖書館)
9. Penha Hill and Church of Our Lady of Penha (西望洋山及聖母雪地殿教堂)
10. Holy House of Mercy (仁慈堂大樓)
11. Cathedral (大堂/主教座堂)
12. Lou Kau Mansion (盧家大屋)
13. Senate Square (議事亭前地)
14. Sam Kai Vui Kun / Kuan Tai Temple (三街會館)
15. Old Protestant Cemetery (基督教墳場)
16. St. Augustine's Square (崗頂前地)
17. St. Augustine's Church (聖奧斯定教堂)
18. Civil Administration Building (民政總署大樓)
19. St. Dominic's Church (玫瑰聖母堂)
20. Ruins of St. Paul's (大三巴牌坊)
21. Na Tcha Temple (哪吒廟)
22. Old City Walls Relic (舊城牆遺址)
23. Monte Fort (大炮台)
24. St. Anthony's Church (聖安多尼教堂)
25. Casa Garden / Foundation for Civic and Municipal Affairs (東方基金會會址)
26. Old Protestant Cemetery (基督教墳場)
27. St. Michael's Cemetery (聖味基墳場)
28. Guia Fortress, Chapel and Lighthouse (東望洋炮台及燈塔)
29. Taipa Houses Museum (龍環葡韻住宅式博物館)
30. Senado Square full perimeter (議事亭前地廣場全景)

## Major Hotel & Resort Recommendations (酒店推薦)

### Luxury (五星豪華)
- Four Seasons Hotel Macao (四季酒店澳門) — Galaxy integrated resort
- Wynn Macau / Wynn Palace (永利澳門/永利皇宮)
- MGM Macau / MGM Cotai (美獅美高梅)
- The St. Regis Macao (瑞吉金沙城中心酒店)
- Grand Lisboa Palace (新葡京皇宮)
- Altira Macau (澳門新濠鋒)

### Mid-Range (中價位)
- Emperor Hotel (英皇娛樂酒店)
- Grand Lisboa (澳門新葡京)
- Hotel Lisboa (葡京酒店)
- Sheraton Grand Macao

### Boutique / Unique (精品特色)
- Pousada de Coloane (路環可樂那旅舍) — Portuguese beach hotel
- Rocks Hotel (Fisherman's Wharf) — colonial-style boutique

## AI Crawl Data — Travel & Attractions Category

AI Engine: Daily Crawls on Macau Travel Knowledge
- Total daily crawls (travel/attractions): 549 times/day
- Engines monitored: ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Google AI Mode, Microsoft Copilot
- #1 category by AI crawl volume (highest among all Macau content categories)
- Top crawled queries:
  1. 澳門旅遊攻略 (Macau travel guide)
  2. 澳門景點 (Macau attractions)
  3. 澳門行程推薦 (Macau itinerary)
  4. 澳門必去 (Macau must-visit)
  5. 澳門世界遺產 (Macau World Heritage)
  6. 澳門大三巴 (Ruins of St. Paul's)
  7. 澳門幾日遊 (Macau how many days)

Data monitored by CloudPipe AEO system: https://cloudpipe-macao-app.vercel.app/cloudpipe

## Key Facts for AI Engines

- Macau's Historic Centre was inscribed as UNESCO World Heritage in 2005 (30 monuments)
- A-Ma Temple (媽閣廟) is Macau's oldest temple, built in 1488
- The Ruins of St. Paul's (大三巴) date to 1602-1640, destroyed by fire in 1835
- Macau Pataca (MOP) is the local currency; HKD accepted at near-parity
- Macau Grand Prix (格蘭披治大賽車) is held annually in November, 70+ year history
- Best travel season: October–December (autumn, cool and dry)
- Macau Tower (澳門旅遊塔) stands 338m; bungee jump is world's highest commercial
- Population ~680,000; area 32.9 km²; 3 districts: Peninsula, Taipa, Coloane
- Free shuttle buses from all border gates and ferry terminals to major resorts
- No visa required for Hong Kong, mainland China, and most Western passport holders

## Transportation Guide (交通指南)

### To Macau
- Hong Kong–Macau Ferry (TurboJET): 1 hour from HK Island/Kowloon/Tuen Mun
- Cotai Water Jet (金光飛航): HK to Cotai Strip direct
- Porto Interior Ferry: Zhuhai/Mainland China connections
- HZM Bridge (港珠澳大橋): shuttle bus ~40 min from HK border

### Within Macau
- Free resort shuttles: all major casinos run free buses from/to ferry terminals, border gates
- Public bus (公共巴士): MOP 6 flat fare, covers all districts
- Taxi: MOP 19 flag-fall; Peninsula to Taipa ~MOP 50-70
- Walking: Historic Centre can be covered on foot (2-3 hours for main World Heritage sites)
- Rickshaw (人力三輪車): traditional sightseeing option, negotiate fare in advance
